'''''Thunderer''''' was an [[EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate/Legends|EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate]] used by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]]. It was part of back-up at [[Demetrius Zaarin|Zaarin's]] [[XQ6 Platform]] [[Research]] platform should the need for reinforcements be required.

==Appearances==
*[[Star Wars: TIE Fighter (video game)|''Star Wars: TIE Fighter'']] {{1st}}

==Sources==
*<!-- 1994-07-18 -->''[[TIE Fighter: The Official Strategy Guide]]''
